product.name: Luxudecor Navy Blue Boho Tufted Comforter Set Queen Size 3 Pieces Boho Shabby Chic Comforter Farmhouse Embroidery Bedding Set Soft Comforter for All Seasons (Navy Blue, 90''x90'')
features: [Boho Tufted Design]: Navy blue comforter set features tufted geometric pattern and embroidered pom pom dots. The elegant and cute design brings a boho modern chic look to your room, adds a touch of exquisiteness and elegance to your sleeping space.

[Soft and Breathable]: Tufted comforter set crafted from premium microfiber fabric with whole piece cloud-like polyester filling, offers an ultra-soft and fluffy feeling, its smooth texture provides silky and comfortable hand-feel. Creating a cozy and breathable sleeping environment.

[Queen size Comforter Set]: You can get a 3-piece comforter set with 1 comforter (90''x90'') and 2 pillowcases (20''x26''). The tufted comforter may come wrinkled due to vacuum packed. Please put it in the sun and pat gently for fluffy.

[All Seasons]: Boho bed set suitable for all seasons, soft fabric will keep you warm in winter and breathable in summer, hidden neat stitching can prevents the filling from shifting or clumping after washing, giving you a wonderful sleeping experience.

[Gift Idea]: Chic style farmhouse comforter set transfers any bedroom, master room, guest room, the exquisite appearance and elegance bring you a beautiful visual enjoyment. It is also a perfect gift for teen women men on Birthday, Christmas,Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, and other holidays.

[Easy Care]: Luxudecor bedding set can be machine wash separately in cold water with gentle cycle. Air-dry or tumble dry on low, do not bleach, dry clean or iron. If you have any question, please feel free to contact us, our customer service staff will reply to you within 24 hours.
